name: Lobster Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove meat from lobster body and claws. Cube the meat.
2. Scald milk with lobster shells. Discard the shells.
3. Slightly saute' the lobster in butter until lightly browned.
4. Add the scalded milk to the pot and bring back to a boil.
5. Remove from heat, add heavy cream, season to taste with salt and white pepper, and serve.
